templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-310-765-1520, or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: In what order are points used when I redeem them?
templates.content: When points are redeemed, they follow the "first in, first out" rule - the first points earned will also be the first to get redeemed.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://muradus2.aftership.com/

templates.name: Do my Murad Rewards points expire?
templates.content: Yes, your points will expire 365 days after the earned date. Our system will automatically keep track of your points earned date, then remove them on day 366 when they expire.

templates.name: Do you ship to PO Boxes?
templates.content: Most items may be shipped to a P.O. Box or Military APO/FPO addresses, but some restrictions apply. Orders being sent to P.O. Boxes must select Priority Shipping. P.O. Boxes are not eligible for Standard, Expedited or Overnight Shipping.

templates.name: Do you have a student discount?
templates.content: You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://www.murad.com/pages/unidays

templates.name: Do you ship to Hawaii, Alaska or the US Territories?
templates.content: Yes! Orders for Alaska, Hawaii, Guam, Puerto Rico, and the U.S. Virgin Islands are shipped via priority shipping with shipping rates beginning at $14.95 to ensure timely receipt of the order.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here: https://www.murad.com/pages/beauty-rewards

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/muradskincare/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/MuradSkincare/

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@murad.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content:
If for any reason you are not completely satisfied with our products, please call our customer care team at 1-310-765-1520 or use the live chat feature on our website available Monday-Friday 6:00 am - 5:00 pm PST: https://www.murad.com/ 

A team member will provide you with a Return Merchandise Authorization number (RMA#). Once you have the RMA#, please follow the steps outlined under "How do I make a return" on this link: https://www.murad.com/pages/faqs?tab=returns

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@murad.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Why did some of my items ship separately?
templates.content: If your order contains multiple items, your items may be split up into multiple shipments and shipped at different times (rest assured, you are only charged one combined shipping fee for all the items in your order). When we ship your order in multiple packages, these packages may arrive separately.

templates.name: What is the estimated delivery date on the product page?
templates.content: The estimated delivery date is just that, an estimate, not a guarantee. Various factors such as inventory, where the order ships from, what shipping method was chosen and any disruptions the carrier may experience such as weather or mechanical issues can cause delivery delays.

templates.name: Do your products contain parabens?
templates.content:
Many products manufactured by Murad are formulated without parabens. To determine if a product you're interested in is formulated without parabens, visit the specific product page at Murad.com and look under the "Formulated Without" tab. 

At Murad, we use different preservatives depending upon the unique formula of each product accordingly. Murad's product development team continually monitors scientific literature, and FDA safety alerts and guidance, to ensure that all of our products are safe and fully compliant with all applicable rules, regulations and laws.

templates.name: Do your products contain animal by-products?
templates.content:
Most our topical formulas are formulated without animal by-products; however, a small number do contain trace amounts of natural ingredients like honey and beeswax, as well as some marine-derived compounds. 

To determine if a product you're interested in is formulated without animal by-products, visit the specific product page at Murad.com and look under the "Formulated Without" tab.

templates.name: Discontinued products
templates.content: we're continually innovating and reformulating to bring you the best-in-class, clinically proven products for efficacious skincare results. Sometimes, that means discontinuing a product to replace it with a new innovation, which is why we're happy to show you which products are designed to meet and exceed the results of your previous product. You can learn more here: https://www.murad.com/pages/discontinued-product

templates.name: Are your products hypoallergenic?
templates.content: 'Hypo' means 'less' so though there may be fewer irritants, they're all not completely absent. Generally, the term 'hypoallergenic' is beauty industry shorthand for 'fragrance free', which is always a good idea for sensitive skin. The special Murad Recipe of antioxidants, anti-inflammatories, and hydrators helps to reduce irritation and inflammation. Additionally, it is always best to perform a patch test if you have any concerns regarding sensitivity.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via UPS, and once shipped, it will take 5-7 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Are your products safe to use while pregnant or breastfeeding?
templates.content: We carefully assess our products and ingredients to ensure they are safe for use. Because every person and pregnancy is unique, we recommend you seek your doctor's advice if you are unsure or have any questions about the products you use during pregnancy and/or lactation.

templates.name: How do I make changes, skip or cancel my subscription?
templates.content: You can change your next order date, skip an order, change your selected frequency, or cancel a subscription by visiting the 'Manage Subscriptions' section in your Murad.com account or by calling customer care at 1-310-765-1520. Our team will be more than happy to assist you!

templates.name: Do your products contain gluten?
templates.content:
Many products manufactured by Murad are formulated without gluten. To determine if a product you're interested in is formulated without gluten, visit the specific product page at Murad.com and look under the "Formulated Without" tab. 

As with any allergy, it is best to consult your physician if there is any concern regarding gluten. In addition, we are certainly more than happy to assist you in creating a regimen that addresses your specific concerns while avoiding any form of gluten.

templates.name: Can I use products from different collections?
templates.content:
Yes! You can mix and match Murad products, but you should only use two or more Step 2 treatments if the directions specify that you can. Traditionally, it is best to use one Step 2 treatment in the morning, and one Step 2 treatment in the evening. Murad products are labeled Cleanse | Tone (Step 1), Treat | Repair (Step 2), Hydrate | Protect (Step 3) and Boost (Step 4). Below are ways to use products from different lines: 

• You can cleanse (1), treat (2), hydrate (3), and boost (4) 
• You can cleanse (1), tone (1), treat (2), hydrate (3), and boost (4) 
• You can cleanse (1), treat (2), hydrate (3), and then SPF (3)

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can take a look at our authorized retailers here: https://www.murad.com/pages/authorized-retailers

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at customerservice@murad.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at customerservice@murad.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $50. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: How are refunds processed?
templates.content:
Please allow 5-10 business days to process your refund once your return tracking shows as "Delivered" and your return is received at our warehouse. We will credit or refund the purchase price paid by you for the item(s) plus any tax paid on the item(s), less any discounts, rebates, credits or refunds already given to you in connection with such products. 

Please note that the original shipping and handling charges, if any, will not be refunded.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.murad.com/pages/faqs?tab=returns

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.murad.com/collections/bestsellers-x
